5 Dezmund Olivier

5 Dezmund Olivier

  • Position:
    Guard
  • Height:
    6-2
  • Class:
    Redshirt Freshman
  • Major:
    Exercise Science
  • Hometown:
    Rock Island, Ill.
  • High School:
    Rock Island
  • Summary
  • Media
  • Season
  • Career

Summary

Biography

High School:
Second Team All-Conference senior year at Rock Island High School… averaged 12 points, 7 rebounds, 2 steals, and 2 blocks a game… team Defensive Player of the Year and Rebound of the Year… Western Big 6 Academic All-Conference. 

Personal:  Son of Larry and Desirae Olivier… has one brother, Larry… an exercise science major.
No stats available for the current season.
